title: 🎈Balloons🎈
description: Adds balloons that are good decoration and a good assistant for traveling around the world
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80074705790b369eda7dd54854c9c7ed00395c71.png)

# ❔ **About**

This datapack, as the name implies, adds balloons - a universal item that can be used as decoration for your building, and to help you travel around the world, since they weaken mob's/player's gravity when attached to its.

### Recipe:
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb78123062264a87b2cbd69823fad2eaeab29123.gif)

To fly into the air, the player will need a total of 9 balloons, and a mob will need only 3.

# 💿 **Installation**

This datapack is installed like any other. Don't forget to install and enable the resource pack.  
### ❗At the moment, for this datapack to work, you must enable Experimental Features (Update 1.21) when creating a new world. (if you are adding a datapack through the "Data Packs" menu when creating a world, this should enable itself)

# 🔍 **How To Use**

Right Click...
- ...on ground with item -> Place balloon (immediately attached to the player).  
- ...on balloon when attached -> Unattach balloon.  
- ...on fence when attached -> Attach balloon to fence.  
- ...with Shift on mob when attached -> Attach balloon to mob.
- ...on unattached/attached to fence/mob balloon -> Attach balloon to player.

# 🛠️ **Compatibility**
❔This datapack should work in multiplayer (not tested).  
❗This datapack may have problems with other datapacks/mods that somehow change pigs and slimes.

# ⚙️ **Optimisation**
I tried to do normal optimization to the best of my ability, but, unfortunately, it is not ideal.  
**I highly do not recommend placing more than 50-100 balloons, as this can cause a decreasing TPS on even medium/powerful PCs.**

# 📨 **Feedback**
If you have ideas for improving the datapack (both from the content and from the technical side), please open issue on github or message me in Discord.
> Discord - @bimbusick
